questionHtml: Explain with reference to the binding site on the enzyme how a non-competitive inhibitor lowers the value of Vmax.
markschemeHtml:
binds at allosteric site

OR

binds away from active site

 

changes shape of active site

OR

renders active sites ineffective

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Explain with reference to the binding site on the enzyme how a non-competitive inhibitor lowers the value of Vmax.
